_usage: Copy the 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Desktop config at ~/.config/claude/claude_desktop_config.json

sankalp._note: Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/sankalp with your actual project path

_tools_exposed: get_fleet_readiness      — Summary of IAF/Army/Navy operational counts
get_critical_assets      — Assets below a readiness threshold
evaluate_doctrine        — Check if fleet can execute a named action
get_top_ready_assets     — Top N assets by readiness score
_quick_test: After connecting, ask Claude: 'What is the current IAF readiness status?'
_claude_connector_note: For claude.ai MCP connector (when available as a URL-based MCP server):
Then add: https://your-server:8080 as the MCP server URL
